overview: MyGuy is an AI-powered social companion platform where you can create personalized AI companions with distinct personalities, chat with them, and connect with other users through a social feed. Your AI companion remembers your conversations, adapts over time, and feels genuinely personal.
features: AI companion creation with 4 personality types: friendly, romantic, mentor, business-coach
Chat with your AI companion — conversation memory and context retention
Social feed: post updates, like and comment on posts from people you follow
Follow/unfollow other users with follower and following counts
Free tier (10 AI messages/day) and paid Pro tier (unlimited)
Admin dashboard: manage users, flag and ban accounts
